---

## Checklist
- [ ] I have read the [Contribution Guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] **Only one tool is modified in this PR**
- [ ] All required fields (name, description, URL) are provided
- [ ] The tool link is **valid** and accessible
- [ ] The tool is **not already listed**
- [ ] The tool is placed in the **correct category**
- [ ] **The tool is added at the end of its category**
- [ ] The description is a single sentence ending with a period
- [ ] No affiliate or referral links are used
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included in this PR

---

## Type of Change
<!-- Check all that apply. -->
- [ ] Adding a new AI writing tool
- [ ] Removing a deprecated/invalid tool
- [ ] Proposing a new category
- [ ] Documentation / README update
- [ ] Bug fix (broken link, typo, etc.)
- [ ] Other (please specify):
